channel.title: Monte Carlo Methods and Applications
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Monte Carlo Methods and Applications

item.title: Investigating the ecological fallacy through sampling distributions constructed from finite populations
item.description: Article by Masoud Majidizadeh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2013

item.title: Bernoulli factory: The 2𝚙-coin problem
item.description: Article by Masoud Majidizadeh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2016

item.title: Randomized vector algorithm with iterative refinement for solving boundary integral equations
item.description: Article by Masoud Majidizadeh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2022

item.title: Application of semiclassical approximation to stochastic differential equations
item.description: Article by Masoud Majidizadeh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2017

item.title: Trapezoidal and Simpson’s methods with a random design
item.description: Article by Masoud Majidizadeh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2019

item.title: Periodic INAR(1) model with Bell innovations distribution
item.description: Article by Masoud Majidizadeh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2015

item.title: Effect of biaxial strain on the binding energies of adsorbed In and Al atoms on (001) surfaces of InAs and AlAs
item.description: Article by Masoud Majidizadeh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2023

item.title: Estimating pharmacokinetic parameters from Dynamic Contrast-Enhanced T 1-weighted MRI using a three level hierarchical Bayesian model
item.description: Article by Masoud Majidizadeh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2018

item.title: Bayesian analysis of the COVID-19 pandemic using a Poisson process with change-points
item.description: Article by Masoud Majidizadeh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2020
